rulings.Case Title: ALLEN R SIMPSON VS. BANK OF AMERICA NT & SA(S)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, December 1, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Judgment was entered in favor of defendant and against plaintiff in case number CGC-01-420367. This action is barred by the principle of res judicata. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE REPORTING A CORPORATION VS. WAUKEEN Q MCCOY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, December 1, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT WAUKEEN MCCOY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer.
